title: Solver and Benchmark Descriptions of ICCMA 2023: 5th International Competition on Computational Models of Argumentation
note: Edited volume, Department of Computer Science Series of Publications B, B-2023-3. Includes 'Crustabri, the evolution of CoQuiAAS' by Jean-Marie Lagniez, Emmanuel Lonca, and Jean-Guy Mailly on page 20.
